response.justification: The candidate is disqualified on the single hardest requirement: native-level Japanese proficiency, which Bogdan does not possess (his listed languages are English, Romanian, and basic German). Beyond this critical blocker, his 15+ year career is almost entirely in web, full-stack, and cloud development (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB), with only superficial C/C++ exposure and no discernible background in embedded networking firmware, LAN-switch development, Linux kernel modification, or any of the required security technologies such as MACsec, 802.1X, or MAC authentication.
strengths: Extensive engineering career spanning 15+ years with broad platform exposure including a mention of embedded systems
Some C and C++ experience from National Instruments and personal thesis project involving Linux and audio systems
Demonstrated Linux familiarity through DevOps work, open-source projects, and infrastructure setup
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency — a stated non-negotiable hard requirement for the role
No experience with the required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal, device attack detection) or embedded LAN-switch firmware
Core skill set (TypeScript, Node.js, web/cloud architecture) is fundamentally misaligned with C-based embedded networking development

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking or security feature experience
Broad engineering background with some C and Linux exposure
